targets.rawSql: SELECT coalesce(sum(jsonb_array_length(cr.containers)), 0)::int AS running FROM container_runtime cr
SELECT count(*)::int AS agents FROM container_runtime WHERE jsonb_array_length(containers) > 0
SELECT count(*)::int AS critical FROM container_cve_findings WHERE severity = 'critical'
SELECT count(*)::int AS high FROM container_cve_findings WHERE severity = 'high'
SELECT count(*)::int AS total FROM container_cve_findings

SELECT h.agent_id, h.name, host(h.ip) AS ip, h.criticality, h.wazuh_status, h.eol_os, coalesce(jsonb_array_length(cr.containers), 0) AS running_containers, (SELECT count(*) FROM container_cve_findings cc WHERE cc.agent_id = h.agent_id) AS container_cves, (SELECT count(*) FROM cve_findings cv WHERE cv.agent_id = h.agent_id AND cv.actionable = true) AS host_cves, cr.updated_at AS containers_seen_at FROM hosts h LEFT JOIN container_runtime cr ON cr.agent_id = h.agent_id WHERE h.agent_id != '000' ORDER BY CASE h.criticality WHEN 'critical' THEN 1 WHEN 'high' THEN 2 WHEN 'medium' THEN 3 WHEN 'low' THEN 4 ELSE 5 END, h.name

SELECT h.name AS host, h.agent_id, host(h.ip) AS ip, h.criticality, c.elem->>'name' AS container_name, c.elem->>'image' AS image, c.elem->>'status' AS status, cr.updated_at AS snapshot_at FROM container_runtime cr JOIN hosts h ON h.agent_id = cr.agent_id CROSS JOIN LATERAL jsonb_array_elements(cr.containers) AS c(elem) ORDER BY h.name, container_name

SELECT h.name AS host, cc.agent_id, host(h.ip) AS ip, h.criticality, cc.image_ref, cc.severity, count(*) AS cve_count, max(cc.scanned_at) AS last_scan FROM container_cve_findings cc JOIN hosts h ON h.agent_id = cc.agent_id GROUP BY h.name, cc.agent_id, h.ip, h.criticality, cc.image_ref, cc.severity ORDER BY CASE cc.severity WHEN 'critical' THEN 1 WHEN 'high' THEN 2 WHEN 'medium' THEN 3 WHEN 'low' THEN 4 ELSE 5 END, cve_count DESC

panels.title: CVE counts by image and severity

targets.rawSql: SELECT h.name AS host, host(h.ip) AS ip, h.criticality, cc.image_ref, cc.cve_id, cc.package_name, cc.installed_version, cc.fixed_version, cc.severity, cc.cvss, cc.scanned_at FROM container_cve_findings cc JOIN hosts h ON h.agent_id = cc.agent_id WHERE cc.severity IN ('critical', 'high') ORDER BY cc.cvss DESC NULLS LAST, h.name, cc.image_ref LIMIT 100

SELECT h.name AS host, host(h.ip) AS ip, h.criticality, cc.image_ref, cc.cve_id, cc.package_name, cc.installed_version, cc.fixed_version, cc.severity, cc.cvss, cc.scanned_at FROM container_cve_findings cc JOIN hosts h ON h.agent_id = cc.agent_id ORDER BY cc.cvss DESC NULLS LAST, h.name, cc.image_ref, cc.cve_id
